hypothesis: Metal lattices exhibiting interstitial ELF maxima between 0.60 and 0.85 at high-symmetry interstitial sites with coordination number 12 will, when hydrogen-filled to H/M ratios of 8–12 and compressed to 150–250 GPa, produce superhydrides with electron–phonon coupling constants λ ≥ 1.2 and superconducting transition temperatures Tc ≥ 100 K.
